title: picris japonica subsp. japonica
intro: Picris japonica subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese hawk's beard or Japanese picris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Picris japonica subsp. japonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Asian medicine. Herbal preparations of Picris japonica subsp. japonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
